title: Company Data Enricher Input
description: Provide domains, company names, or Wikidata IDs to enrich with public company data.

domains.title: Company Domains
domains.description: List of company website domains to enrich. Plain domain (e.g., 'stripe.com') or full URL (e.g., 'https://stripe.com'). Do not include paths.

queries.title: Company Name Searches
queries.description: Search by company name. Returns the best-matching public company with available data.

wikidataIds.title: Wikidata IDs
wikidataIds.description: Wikidata entity IDs for direct lookup (e.g., 'Q95' for Google). Provides structured data from Wikipedia's knowledge graph.

mode.title: Enrichment Mode
mode.description: 'enrich' fetches all available data fields. 'quick' fetches only basic metadata (faster but less detailed).

delayMs.title: Request Delay (ms)
delayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between requests to avoid rate limiting. Increase for large batches.
